workflows.name: Full Acquisition Review
workflows.summary: Run the complete acquisition pipeline from diligence through closing.
workflows.operatorGoal: Create a full IC-ready acquisition package.

workflows.name: Quick Deal Screen
workflows.summary: Run a fast go/no-go screen using core diligence and underwriting.
workflows.operatorGoal: Decide whether the deal deserves deeper pursuit.

workflows.name: Underwriting Refresh
workflows.summary: Refresh the financial model, sensitivity cases, and IC memo.
workflows.operatorGoal: Update the economics without rerunning the whole acquisition file.

workflows.name: Financing Package
workflows.summary: Prepare an underwriting-backed financing package and lender comparison.
workflows.operatorGoal: Package the deal for debt sizing and lender outreach.

workflows.name: Legal / PSA Review
workflows.summary: Run legal diligence and PSA review without loan-document review unless financing exists.
workflows.operatorGoal: Surface contract, title, insurance, transfer, and environmental blockers.
